title: Warm up
content: This slide features images of three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, viewed from a car's perspective. It provides a visual introduction to the cities.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide features imagery of taxis and iconic landmarks from various Chinese cities. It sets the theme for exploring changes and developments in China.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain! Investigate and research
content: The session encourages the exploration of local features, development strategies, and their positive impacts on cities. It outlines a process for understanding urban growth.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide links Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou to specific development strategies. It visualizes these cities' growth approaches.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: This slide connects urban development strategies with local features as perceived by taxi drivers. It emphasizes adaptable growth tailored to each city's characteristics.
